name: Budget Red Beans and Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop 1 large green pepper.
2. Chop 1 large onion.
3. Chop 1 cup celery.
4. Add 1 can Diced green chiles (4 oz.).
5. Snip 1/4 cup fresh parsley.
6. Add 1 teaspoon ground cumin.
7. Add 1/4 to 1/2 teaspoon chili powder.
8. Add 1/4 teaspoon hot sauce.
9. Add 1 teaspoon paprika.
10. Add 1 teaspoon salt.
11. Add 1 teaspoon vinegar.
Place beans in a Dutch oven with water. Bring to a boil; simmer for 2 minutes. Remove from heat. Cover and let stand for one hour. Drain and rinse beans. Return to Dutch oven with broth, garlic, and bay leaves; bring to a boil. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 1 1/4 hours. Stir in all remaining ingredients. Cover and simmer for one hour or until beans and vegetables are tender and gravy is thick. Remove bay leaves. Serve over rice. This meal costs only $.68 per plate.
